notes: v0.16.71 — Picked 3 of the lab prototypes now LIVE in the real Rift runtime. Speed normalised for every class (380 px/s) so HP-tanky builds aren't punished by these modes. (1) CORE DEFENCE (replaces HAZARD) — defend a central core for 60 s vs 4 seeker archetypes (BASIC fast triangle, TANK slow hex, SNIPER fires shots, KAMI sprint + AOE on death). Spawn cadence accelerates in the final 20 s. Core HP shown as a green ring; player death OR core death = loss. (2) CHAIN LINKS (replaces SLIPSTREAM) — 6 hex pads around centre; destroy in numeric order × 5 rounds. Wrong target = self-damage. Inactive pads fire orbiters aimed at you. Each round shuffles which pad is which order so memorisation doesn't work. (3) OVERLOAD GRID (replaces STRAFE) — 6 generators ring the arena. Shoot to add heat; hot gens fire homing seekers at you. Max heat = detonate (+1 overload, clears nearby waves) and respawn after cooldown. Target is 6 + 2 × difficulty overloads (EASY 6 → BRUTAL 12). All three scale per difficulty: BRUTAL ~2× spawn rate, ~1.8× damage, faster heat decay. Windows only.
